ty":"payable","type":"receive"}],"devdoc":{"author":"Relcko","details":"=== DESIGN OVERVIEW === **Stages:** The presale is divided into sequential stages, each with its own token price (denominated in USDT, 18 decimals), supply cap, and per-user contribution limits. Only one stage may be active at a time. The owner activates stages. **Payments:**   - `buyWithToken`   \u2014 USDT only. Tokens are calculated as `paymentAmount / price`.   - `buyWithNative`  \u2014 BNB (native). BNB is converted to USDT via the Chainlink BNB/USD      oracle (or an emergency owner-override rate), then tokens are calculated as above. **Oracle:** The native-to-USDT conversion uses the Chainlink BNB/USD price feed with a 2-hour staleness threshold. The owner may set an emergency override rate. **Security:**   - ReentrancyGuard protects all purchase functions.   - Pausable allows emergency stop by owner.   - Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern followed in all state-changing functions.   - Custom errors for all failure modes (gas-efficient, no string reversal). **Withdrawals:**   - Collected USDT and BNB can be withdrawn by the owner at any time.   - Unsold RLKO tokens can be withdrawn only when no stage is active.","errors":{"EnforcedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is paused."}],"ExpectedPause()":[{"details":"The operation failed because the contract is not paused."}],"OwnableInvalidOwner(address)":[{"details":"The owner is not a valid owner account. (eg. `address(0)`)"}],"OwnableUnauthorizedAccount(address)":[{"details":"The caller account is not authorized to perform an operation."}],"ReentrancyGuardReentrantCall()":[{"details":"Unauthorized reentrant call."}],"SafeERC20FailedOperation(address)":[{"details":"An operation with an ERC-20 token failed."}]},"events":{"NativeRateUpdated(uint256)":{"params":{"rate":"New override rate (0 means Chainlink is live)."}},"Paused(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the pause is triggered by `account`."},"StageActivated(uint256)":{"params":{"stageId":"Index of the activated stage."}},"StageAdded(uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"maxPerUser":"Maximum contribution per user in USDT.","minPerUser":"Minimum contribution per user in USDT.","price":"Token price in USDT (18 decimals).","stageId":"Index of the added stage.","supply":"Token supply cap for the stage."}},"StageDeactivated(uint256)":{"params":{"stageId":"Index of the deactivated stage."}},"StageUpdated(uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"maxPerUser":"New maximum per user.","minPerUser":"New minimum per user.","price":"New token price.","stageId":"Index of the updated stage.","supply":"New supply cap."}},"TokensPurchased(address,address,uint256,uint256,uint256)":{"params":{"buyer":"Address of the buyer.","paymentAmount":"Amount paid in USDT or purchased."}},"Unpaused(address)":{"details":"Emitted when the pause is lifted by `account`."},"Withdrawn(address,uint256)":{"params":{"amount":"Amount withdrawn.","token":"Address of the withdrawn decimals).","price":"Token price in USDT (18 decimals).","supply":"Maximum number of tokens for this stage."}},"buyWithNative()":{"details":"Follows Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern.      The BNB->USDT conversion uses the Chainlink oracle or emergency override."},"buyWithToken(address,uint256)":{"details":"Follows Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern.","params":{"paymentAmount":"Amount of paymentToken to spend.","paymentToken":"Address of the ERC20 token (must be USDT)."}},"constructor":{"params":{"_bnbUsdFeed":"Address of the Chainlink BNB/USD price feed.","_saleToken":"Address of the token being sold (RLKO).","_usdt":"Address of the USDT token."}},"currentStage()":{"returns":{"_0":"Current stage index."}},"currentStageInfo()":{"returns":{"active":"    Whether the stage is active.","maxPerUser":"Maximum per user contribution (USDT, 18 decimals).","minPerUser":"Minimum per user contribution (USDT, 18 decimals).","price":"     Token price (USDT, 18 decimals).","sold":"      Tokens sold so far.","supply":"    Total supply cap."}},"owner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the current owner."},"paused()":{"details":"Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise."},"pendingOwner()":{"details":"Returns the address of the pending owner."},"previewPurchase(uint256,bool)":{"params":{"isNative":"True if the payment is in native token (BNB).","paymentAmount":"Amount in USDT (or wei when isNative)."},"returns":{"remainingSupply":"Supply remaining after the hypothetical purchase.","stage":"         The active stage index.","tokenAmount":"   Tokens the caller would receive.","usdtAmount":"    USDT-equivalent value (18 decimals)."}},"renounceOwnership()":{"details":"Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner."},"setNativeToUsdtRate(uint256)":{"params":{"rate":"Rate in 18 decimals (e.g. 60_000e18 for 1 BNB = 60 000 USDT).             Set to zero to revert to using the Chainlink oracle."}},"tokenPrice()":{"returns":{"_0":"Token price, or 0 if no stage is active."}},"tokensRemaining()":{"returns":{"_0":"Remaining supply, or 0 if no stage is active."}},"transferOwnership(address)":{"details":"Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. acceptOwnership().details: The new owner accepts the ownership transfer.

params.stageId: Index of the stage to activate.

params.maxPerUser: Maximum contribution in USDT per user (18 decimals).
params.minPerUser: Minimum contribution in USDT per user (18 decimals).
params.supply: Maximum number of tokens for this stage.

buyWithNative().details: Follows Checks-Effects-Interactions pattern.      The BNB->USDT conversion uses the Chainlink oracle or emergency override.

params.paymentToken: Address of the ERC20 token (must be USDT).

params._bnbUsdFeed: Address of the Chainlink BNB/USD price feed.
params._saleToken: Address of the token being sold (RLKO).

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

pendingOwner().details: Returns the address of the pending owner.

params.isNative: True if the payment is in native token (BNB).
params.paymentAmount: Amount in USDT (or wei when isNative).

returns.remainingSupply: Supply remaining after the hypothetical purchase.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

params.rate: Rate in 18 decimals (e.g. 60_000e18 for 1 BNB = 60 000 USDT).             Set to zero to revert to using the Chainlink oracle.

returns._0: Token price, or 0 if no stage is active.
Remaining supply, or 0 if no stage is active.

transferOwnership(address).details: Starts the ownership transfer of the contract to a new account. Replaces the pending transfer if there is one. Can only be called by the current owner. Setting `newOwner` to the zero address is allowed; this can be used to cancel an initiated ownership transfer.

params.maxPerUser: New maximum per user contribution in USDT (18 decimals).
params.minPerUser: New minimum per user contribution in USDT (18 decimals).
params.price: New token price in USDT (18 decimals).
params.stageId: Index of the stage to update.

params.token: Token address, or address(0) for native BNB.

withdrawSaleTokens(uint256).details: Only possible when no stage is active (prevents withdrawal during sale).

params.amount: Amount of sale tokens to withdraw.

ORACLE_DECIMALS().notice: Number of decimals in the Chainlink BNB/USD answer.

ORACLE_STALENESS_THRESHOLD().notice: Maximum age of Chainlink oracle data before it is considered stale (2 hours).

USDT().notice: The USDT token used for quote payments.

activateStage(uint256).notice: Activate a stage, deactivating any previously active stage.

addStage(uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256.notice: Add a new presale stage (starts inactive).

buyWithToken(address,uint256).notice: Buy tokens with an ERC20 token (USDT only).

currentStage().notice: Returns the index of the currently active stage.

currentStageIndex().notice: Index of the currently active stage.

currentStageInfo().notice: Returns the complete active stage struct.

nativeRateOverride().notice: Returns the current override rate (0 means Chainlink is live).

previewPurchase(uint256,bool).notice: Preview a purchase without modifying state.

setNativeToUsdtRate(uint256).notice: Set an emergency override for the native-to-USDT rate.

stageCount().notice: Returns the total number of configured stages.

tokenPrice().notice: Returns the token price for the active stage (USDT, 18 decimals).

tokensRemaining().notice: Returns the remaining token supply in the active stage.

totalAllocation().notice: Sum of all stage supply caps.

totalRaised().notice: Total USDT raised across all stages.

totalTokensSold().notice: Total sale tokens sold across all stages.

userContributions(address,uint256).notice: Contributions per user per stage (USDT, 18 decimals).

userInvestment(address).notice: Returns the total amount a user has contributed in USDT for the active stage.

withdrawFunds(address).notice: Withdraw collected funds (USDT or native BNB).
